contextual.title: Nebulized Colistin for Hospital-Acquired Pneumonia
contextual.text:
Summary: Nebulized Colistin for Adjunctive Therapy of Hospital-Acquired Pneumonia caused by Gram Negative Bacteria should be more effective than conventional therapy
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 Adult (age>18 years) hospitalized patient with hospital-acquired pneumonia due to Gram negative bacteria 

 
Exclusion criteria: : 

 pregnancy 

 lactating woman 

 colistin allergy 

 severe renal impairment 

 epilepsy
